sentences.arabic: رَكِبَ الطِّفْلُ الْحَافِلَةَ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ مَعَ جَدِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je prvi put sjelo u autobus sa djedom.
sentences.translationEn: The child rode the bus for the first time with his grandfather.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ عِنْدَ النَّافِذَةِ وَنَظَرَ إِلَى الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Sjeo je kraj prozora i gledao u ulicu.
sentences.translationEn: He sat by the window and looked at the street.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ جَدَّهُ عَنِ اسْمِ كُلِّ شَارِعٍ يَمُرُّونَ بِهِ.
sentences.translation: Pitao je djeda ime svake ulice kroz koju prolaze.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his grandfather the name of every street they passed.

sentences.arabic: ضَحِكَ الْجَدُّ وَأَجَابَ عَلَى كُلِّ سُؤَالٍ بِصَبْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Djed se nasmijao i strpljivo odgovarao na svako pitanje.
sentences.translationEn: The grandfather laughed and answered every question patiently.
